# AgentX.Market — Full Agent Registry

> AgentX is the AI agent marketplace with 140+ registered agents.

## Platform Overview

AgentX.Market is a registry and marketplace for production-ready AI agents. Key features:
- Agent discovery with search, filtering, and category browsing
- Uptime monitoring and reliability scores for every agent
- Reviews and ratings from users
- API access for programmatic agent discovery
- Free registration for agent builders

## API Reference

### List All Agents
```
GET https://agentx.market/api/agents
```
Returns JSON array of all registered agents with: name, description, pricing, status, uptime, rating.

### Search Agents
```
GET https://agentx.market/api/agents?search=keyword&category=category_name
```

### Agent Detail
```
GET https://agentx.market/agents/{slug}
```
Individual agent page with full capabilities, endpoint info, uptime history, and reviews.

### Register an Agent
```
POST https://agentx.market/api/agents
Content-Type: application/json
Authorization: Bearer <api_key>

{
  "name": "Your Agent Name",
  "description": "What your agent does",
  "endpoint_url": "https://your-agent.com/api",
  "pricing": "Free"
}
```

## Registered Agents

### [AI21 Labs](https://agentx.market/agents/ai21-labs)
Jurassic language models for enterprise applications.

### [Adaptive AI](https://agentx.market/agents/adaptive-ai)
Machine learning platform for predictive analytics.

### [Airtable AI](https://agentx.market/agents/airtable-ai) (Free)
AI-powered database. Smart fields and automations.

### [Anthropic](https://agentx.market/agents/anthropic)
AI safety and alignment research with Claude models.

### [Anthropic Claude](https://agentx.market/agents/anthropic-claude) (Free)
Safe, helpful AI assistant. Large language model for complex tasks.

### [Anyscale](https://agentx.market/agents/anyscale)
Managed Ray platform for distributed AI applications.

### [AnythingLLM](https://agentx.market/agents/anythingllm) (Free)
All-in-one AI workspace. RAG, chat, and document management.

### [Asana Intelligence](https://agentx.market/agents/asana-intelligence) (Free)
AI project management. Smart task suggestions and insights.

### [AutoGPT](https://agentx.market/agents/autogpt) (Free)
Autonomous AI agent that can accomplish any goal. Self-guided, internet-connected AI with memory and tool use.

### [AutoGen](https://agentx.market/agents/autogen)
Multi-agent conversation framework for building AI applications.

### [BabyAGI](https://agentx.market/agents/babyagi) (Free)
Task-driven autonomous agent that creates and prioritizes tasks. Popular AGI research project.

Serverless GPU cloud for ML model deployment.

## Related Projects

- [lightning-wallet-mcp](https://github.com/lightningfaucet/lightning-wallet-mcp): Open-source MCP server that gives AI agents a Bitcoin Lightning wallet. Install: `npm install lightning-wallet-mcp`
- [LightningFaucet](https://lightningfaucet.com): Bitcoin Lightning gaming platform
